effective_drift_rate.description: Projected effective drift rate from simulation checks_effective

effective_yield_rate.description: Projected effective yield rate from simulation checks_effective

effective_policy_hold_rate.description: Effective policy hold pressure from simulation checks_effective

no_progress_rate_raw.description: Raw no-progress / attempts rate from counters

opportunities.title: Unified Homeostasis Controller
opportunities.summary: Unify budget, queue pressure, routing degradation, and safety pressure into one global modulation layer.
anti_gaming_guardrails: Do not reduce attempts denominator via silent reclassification; report raw and effective together.
Absolute shipped count over 180d must not decrease.
Safety stop rate must not increase.

opportunities.title: Continuous Interoception Stream
opportunities.summary: Add continuous telemetry (CPU/RAM/disk/latency/token burn) and integrate into strategy mode and route planning.
anti_gaming_guardrails: No threshold changes allowed in the same experiment stage.
Require unchanged harness policy hash between baseline and candidate.

opportunities.title: Immune Memory Policy Synthesis
opportunities.summary: Convert repeated failure signatures into bounded, reviewable preventive policy candidates.
anti_gaming_guardrails: All synthesized rules must be staged as proposals with expiry + rollback.
No direct policy writes from synthesis path.
At least one raw metric and one effective metric must improve.

opportunities.title: Dream-to-Action Bridge
opportunities.summary: Promote high-confidence dream links into bounded micro-experiments with explicit success criteria.
anti_gaming_guardrails: Require objective_id and success criteria for every promoted experiment.
Cap promoted experiments per cycle to prevent queue spam.
Count only shipped outcomes for yield gains.

opportunities.title: Proprioception Control Plane
opportunities.summary: Live map of active workers/cells, leases, cooldowns, blocked routes, and in-flight risk to reduce blind execution.
anti_gaming_guardrails: Track both queue pending ratio and shipped throughput.
No suppression of blocked events; visibility must increase.
Hold counts may move, but shipped/attempted must improve.

opportunities.title: Circulatory QoS Lanes
opportunities.summary: End-to-end QoS lanes with explicit admission and lane pressure balancing across proposal->queue->execution.
anti_gaming_guardrails: Lane demotions must not silently drop proposals without audit rows.
Queue total and shipped must both be reported.
